params._commitment: The commitment to the polynomial. 48 bytes, part of the preimage key.
params._partOffset: The offset of the preimage to store.
params._proof: The KZG proof, part of the preimage key.
params._y: Big endian point value. The preimage for the key.
params._z: Big endian point value. Part of the preimage key.

params._partOffset: The offset of the preimage to read.

loadLocalData(uint256,bytes32,bytes32,ui.details: The local data parts are loaded into the preimage oracle under the context      of the caller - no other account can write to the caller's context      specific data.      There are 5 local data identifiers:      ┌────────────┬────────────────────────┐      │ Identifier │      Data              │      ├────────────┼────────────────────────┤      │          1 │ L1 Head Hash (bytes32) │      │          2 │ Output Root (bytes32)  │      │          3 │ Root Claim (bytes32)   │      │          4 │ L2 Block Number (u64)  │      │          5 │ Chain ID (u64)         │      └────────────┴────────────────────────┘

params._ident: The identifier of the local data.
params._localContext: The local key context for the preimage oracle. Optionally, can be set as a constant                      if the caller only requires one set of local keys.
params._partOffset: The offset of the local data part to write to the oracle.
params._size: The number of bytes in `_word` to load.

params._input: The input to the precompile call.
params._partOffset: The offset of the precompile result being loaded.
params._requiredGas: The gas required to fully execute an L1 precompile.

params._partOffset: The offset of the preimage to read.

params._key: The key of the preimage to read.
params._offset: The offset of the preimage to read.

returns.datLen_: The length of the preimage data.

KECCAK_TREE_DEPTH().notice: The depth of the keccak256 merkle tree. Supports up to 65,536 keccak blocks, or ~8.91MB preimages.

MAX_LEAF_COUNT().notice: The maximum number of keccak blocks that can fit into the merkle tree.

MIN_BOND_SIZE().notice: The minimum bond size for large preimage proposals.

PRECOMPILE_CALL_RESERVED_GAS().notice: The reserved gas for precompile call setup.

addLeavesLPP(uint256,uint256,bytes,bytes.notice: Adds a contiguous list of keccak state matrices to the merkle tree.

challengeFirstLPP(address,uint256,(bytes.notice: Challenge the first keccak256 block that was absorbed.

challengeLPP(address,uint256,(uint64[25].notice: Challenge a keccak256 block that was committed to in the merkle tree.

challengePeriod().notice: Returns the length of the large preimage proposal challenge period.

getTreeRootLPP(address,uint256).notice: Gets the current merkle root of the large preimage proposal tree.

initLPP(uint256,uint32,uint32).notice: Initialize a large preimage proposal. Must be called before adding any leaves.

loadKeccak256PreimagePart(uint256,bytes).notice: Prepares a preimage to be read by keccak256 key, starting at the given offset and up to 32 bytes         (clipped at preimage length, if out of data).

loadLocalData(uint256,bytes32,bytes32,ui.notice: Loads of local data part into the preimage oracle.

loadPrecompilePreimagePart(uint256,addre.notice: Prepares a precompile result to be read by a precompile key for the specified offset.         The precompile result data is a concatenation of the precompile call status byte and its return data.         The preimage key is `6 ++ keccak256(precompile ++ input)[1:]`.

loadSha256PreimagePart(uint256,bytes).notice: Prepares a preimage to be read by sha256 key, starting at the given offset and up to 32 bytes         (clipped at preimage length, if out of data).

minProposalSize().notice: Returns the minimum size (in bytes) of a large preimage proposal.

preimageLengths(bytes32).notice: Mapping of pre-image keys to pre-image lengths.

preimagePartOk(bytes32,uint256).notice: Mapping of pre-image keys to pre-image part offsets to preimage preparedness.

preimageParts(bytes32,uint256).notice: Mapping of pre-image keys to pre-image offsets to pre-image parts.

proposalBlocks(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Mapping of claimants to proposal UUIDs to blocks which leaves were added to the merkle tree.

proposalBlocksLen(address,uint256).notice: Returns the length of the array with the block numbers of `addLeavesLPP` calls for a given large         preimage proposal.

proposalBonds(address,uint256).notice: Mapping of claimants to proposal UUIDs to bond amounts.

proposalBranches(address,uint256,uint256.notice: Mapping of claimants to proposal UUIDs to the current branch path of the merkleization process.

proposalCount().notice: Returns the length of the `proposals` array

proposalMetadata(address,uint256).notice: Mapping of claimants to proposal UUIDs to the timestamp of creation of the proposal as well as the challenged status.

proposalParts(address,uint256).notice: Mapping of claimants to proposal UUIDs to the preimage part picked up during the absorbtion process.

proposals(uint256).notice: Append-only array of large preimage proposals for off-chain reference.

readPreimage(bytes32,uint256).notice: Reads a preimage from the oracle.

squeezeLPP(address,uint256,(uint64[25]),.notice: Finalize a large preimage proposal after the challenge period has passed.

version().notice: The semantic version of the Preimage Oracle contract.

zeroHashes(uint256).notice: Static padding hashes. These values are persisted in storage, but are entirely immutable         after the constructor's execution.
